mapper.select:
select a.ts_code , b.name , b.area , a.pct_chg , b.industry_name_l1 , b.industry_name_l2 , b.industry_name_l3 , c.top_holder , b.market , a.total_mv , a.pb , a.trade_date from common_daily.`20251216` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join finance.top_hold as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
=#{industryCode} order by total_mv desc

select a.pb, a.ts_code, a.total_mv, a.trade_date, b.name, c.com_name, b.market, b.list_date, b.act_name, b.act_ent_type, c.exchange, c.reg_capital, c.setup_date, c.province, c.city, c.website, industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3 from common_daily.`20251216` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.stock_company as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
= #{industryCode} order by total_mv desc;

select t.ts_code, sl.name, sl.industry_name_l1, sl.industry_name_l2, sl.industry_name_l3, t.conti_up, t.pct_chg, t.y_pct1, t.y_pct2, t.y_pct3, t.y_pct4, t.y_pct5, t.y_pct6, t.y_pct7, t.y_pct8, t.y_pct9, t.y_pct10, t.y_pct11, t.y_pct12, t.y_pct13, t.y_pct14, sl.area, sl.market, t.total_mv, t.pb, t.trade_date from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` t left join stock_list.industry_member sl on t.ts_code = sl.ts_code
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
= #{industryCode} order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.pct_chg,a.close,a.up10_count5,a.up10_count10,a.up10_count15,a.up10_count20, a.down10_count5,a.down10_count10,a.down10_count15,a.down10_count20,a.conti_up,a.pb, b.market,a.total_mv,a.trade_date,b.name,b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
= #{industryCode} order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,b.name,b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3,net_mf_amount,a.pb, a.pct_chg,c.buy_elg_amount,c.buy_lg_amount,c.buy_md_amount,c.buy_sm_amount,a.trade_date, c.sell_elg_amount,c.sell_lg_amount,c.sell_md_amount,c.sell_sm_amount,a.amount,a.turnover_rate,b.market,a.total_mv from common_daily.`20250612` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join money_flow.`20250612` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
= #{industryCode} order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;
select a.ts_code,a.`close`,b.total_mv,b.trade_date,b.pb from hfq_daily.`${startDate}` as a left join common_daily.`${startDate}` as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code ;
select a.ts_code,a.`close`,b.total_mv,b.trade_date,b.pb from hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a left join common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code ;

select ts_code,name,area,industry_name_l1,industry_name_l2,industry_name_l3,market from stock_list.industry_member
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
=#{industryCode}

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.week_pct1,c.week_pct2,c.week_pct3,c.week_pct4,c.week_pct5, c.week_pct6,c.week_pct7,c.week_pct8,c.week_pct9,c.week_pct10, c.week_pct11,c.week_pct12,c.week_pct13,c.week_pct14,c.week_pct15 from common_daily.`20251216` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join hfq_daily.`20260423` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code -- where index_code_l1 = '801040.SI'
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
=#{industryCode}
order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.month_pct1,c.month_pct2,c.month_pct3,c.month_pct4,c.month_pct5, c.month_pct6,c.month_pct7,c.month_pct8,c.month_pct9,c.month_pct10, c.month_pct11,c.month_pct12,c.month_pct13,c.month_pct14,c.month_pct15 from common_daily.`20251216` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join hfq_daily.`20260423` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code -- where index_code_l1 = '801040.SI'
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
=#{industryCode}
order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.season_pct1,c.season_pct2,c.season_pct3,c.season_pct4,c.season_pct5, c.season_pct6,c.season_pct7,c.season_pct8,c.season_pct9,c.season_pct10, c.season_pct11,c.season_pct12,c.season_pct13,c.season_pct14,c.season_pct15 from common_daily.`20251216` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join hfq_daily.`20260423` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code -- where index_code_l1 = '801040.SI'
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
=#{industryCode}
order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.year_pct1,c.year_pct2,c.year_pct3,c.year_pct4,c.year_pct5, c.year_pct6,c.year_pct7,c.year_pct8,c.year_pct9,c.year_pct10, c.year_pct11,c.year_pct12,c.year_pct13,c.year_pct14,c.year_pct15 from common_daily.`20251216` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join hfq_daily.`20260423` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code -- where index_code_l1 = '801040.SI'
index_code_l1
index_code_l2
index_code_l3
area
=#{industryCode}
order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;
